text:
update devel/jakarta-commons-io to 1.3.1.
changelog:
Bug fixes from 1.3
------------------

- FileUtils
  - NPE in openOutputStream(File) when file has no parent in path [IO-112]
  - readFileToString(File) is not static [IO-113]

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
